description: Product Description colgate kids 2-5 years toothbrush Ingredients Colgate kids 2-5y toothbrush Dear Amazon Seller Support, I am writing to clarify a misunderstanding regarding my product listing: Colgate Extra Soft Bunny Toothbrush for 2–5 Years. This item is not a food product, nor does it contain any edible components. It is a personal care item designed for oral hygiene, specifically a toothbrush intended for children aged 2 to 5 years. Therefore, it does not fall under the scope of the European Food Information for Consumers Regulation (EU FIC, 1169/2011/EC), which applies exclusively to food items. I kindly request that this product be correctly classified as a non-food item so that the listing can proceed without the requirement for food-related labeling or documentation. Please let me know if any further clarification or documentation is needed. Thank you for your attention and support. Directions 1. Wet the toothbrush head. 2. Apply toothpaste. 3. Gently brush all surfaces of the teeth in a circular motion. 4. Brush the tongue and inside of cheeks. 5. Rinse thoroughly. 6. Clean the toothbrush and store in a dry place. Safety Warning Warning: not suitable for children under 3 years. May pose a choking hazard. Please use the spatula only for oral hygiene. Please dispose of the spatula after 3 months of use. See more
